gaps.snippet: # [doc = " \\[Declared\\] Returns nanoseconds since the Unix epoch from the wall clock."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Returns `Err` if the system time is before the epoch — never-silent (G2)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Guarantee"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " `Declared` — backed by `std::time::SystemTime`. No audit of platform clock resolution,"] # [doc = " drift, or leap-second handling."] pub fn wall_nanos () -> Result < u128 , String > { SystemTime :: now () . duration_since (UNIX_EPOCH) . map (| d | d . as_nanos ()) . map_err (| e | e . to_string ()) }

Emitting bare `map_err(recv, …)` would fabricate an unknown prim and file-poison myc-check (G-β Rank A / G2/VR-5; residual when the method body itself gapped — e.g. M-1037 `.to_vec()` inside `read_to_end` — so the declaration was never registered)

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " \\[Declared\\] Returns monotonic nanoseconds since an unspecified process-local epoch."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Guaranteed non-decreasing within a single process run (Rust `Instant` guarantee)."] # [doc = " Not comparable across processes or restarts."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Guarantee"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " `Declared` — backed by `std::time::Instant`. OS monotonic clock; no precision audit."] pub fn mono_nanos () -> u64 { static ORIGIN : std :: sync :: OnceLock < Instant > = std :: sync :: OnceLock :: new () ; let origin = ORIGIN . get_or_init (Instant :: now) ; u64 :: try_from (origin . elapsed () . as_nanos ()) . unwrap_or (u64 :: MAX) }

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " \\[Declared\\] Pause the current thread for approximately `nanos` nanoseconds."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Actual sleep duration may exceed `nanos` due to OS scheduling. This is never-silent on that"] # [doc = " imprecision: callers must not assume precision. Use `mono_nanos()` before and after to"] # [doc = " measure actual elapsed duration."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Guarantee"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " `Declared` — backed by `std::thread::sleep(Duration::from_nanos(nanos))`. No precision audit."] pub fn sleep_nanos (nanos : u64) { std :: thread :: sleep (Duration :: from_nanos (nanos)) ; }

gaps.snippet: # [cfg (test)] mod tests { use super :: * ; # [test] fn wall_nanos_ok_and_nonzero () { let result = wall_nanos () ; assert ! (result . is_ok () , "wall_nanos() returned Err: {result:?}") ; let nanos = result . unwrap () ; assert ! (nanos > 0 , "wall_nanos() returned 0, expected a positive timestamp") ; } # [test] fn mono_nanos_nondecreasing () { let t0 = mono_nanos () ; std :: thread :: sleep (Duration :: from_millis (1)) ; let t1 = mono_nanos () ; assert ! (t1 >= t0 , "mono_nanos() decreased: t0={t0}, t1={t1} (monotonicity violation)") ; } # [test] fn sleep_nanos_does_not_panic () { sleep_nanos (1_000_000) ; } # [test] fn mono_nanos_advances_after_sleep () { let t0 = mono_nanos () ; sleep_nanos (5_000_000) ; let t1 = mono_nanos () ; assert ! (t1 > t0 , "mono_nanos() did not advance after 5 ms sleep: t0={t0}, t1={t1}") ; } }
